zh.Abenhall, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾阿本哈爾

zh.lifeSummary: John Richard Abrahall是Rolf Abrahall的兒子，於1370年出生在英國賀福爾。他於大約1397年與Elizabeth Pechere在英國英格蘭賀福爾奧可爾 柏哈德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年在他的家鄉享年105歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Richard Abrahall是Rolf Abrahall的儿子，于1370年出生在英国賀福爾。他于大约1397年与Elizabeth Pechere在英国英格兰賀福爾奧可爾 柏哈德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年在他的家乡享年105岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Abrahall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Aberhall in Hentland (Herefs), which is recorded as Aberhale in 1334. The place-name may mean ‘Eadburh's nook’, from the Old English female personal name Ēadburh (genitive Ēadburge) + halh ‘nook, corner’, though the first element is uncertain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: John Richard Abrahall was born in 1370, in Herefordshire, England as the son of Rolf Abrahall. He married Elizabeth Pechere about 1397, in Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1475, in his hometown, at the age of 105, and was buried in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: John Richard Abrahall est né en 1370, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, fils de Rolf Abrahall. Il a épousé Elizabeth Pechere environ 1397, à Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1475, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 105 ans, et a été enterré à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat um 1397 in Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Pechere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1475 im Alter von 105 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Pechere circa 1397, nel Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: John Richard Abrahallは1370年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでRolf Abrahallの息子として生まれた。約1397年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアオクル プイチャードでElizabeth Pechereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年に故郷で105歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Richard Abrahall(은)는 1370년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Rolf Abrahall의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 옥일 p이처드에서 Elizabeth Pechere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 그의 고향에서 105세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Richard Abrahall nasceu em 1370, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra filho de Rolf Abrahall. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Pechere aproximadamente 1397, em Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1475, em sua cidade natal, com 105 anos, e foi sepultado em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: John Richard Abrahall родился в 1370 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. Его отца звали Rolf Abrahall. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Pechere около 1397 г. в местности окл пичард, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1475 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 105 лет и был похоронен в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
